title: K.G.F: Chapter 1
tmdbOverview: A period drama set in the 1970s, KGF follows the story of a fierce rebel who rises against the brutal oppression in Kolar Gold Fields and becomes the symbol of hope to legions of downtrodden people.
synopsis: K.G.F: Chapter 1 is a 2018 action, thriller and adventure film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
